title: FardinSO Fps Modpack
description: This modpack supports Minecraft versions 1.21.5 - 26.1 and is designed to provide excellent FPS for a smooth and responsive gameplay experience. In addition to performance-enhancing mods, it also includes several fun and interesting mods that make the
body:
# **FPS Benchmark** I tested these mods in both multiplayer and single-player. They give me a very good amount of FPS. In single-player, with the render distance set to 16, I get over 250+ FPS. And in multiplayer, no matter what the server’s render distance is, I get more than 350+ FPS. # FardinSO Fps Modpack
Test Avg FPS Min FPS Max FPS
Fps Booster 100 200 400
Vanilla Minecraft 60 100 150
# System Setup ## Here’s the system setup I used for this benchmark:
Component Specification
CPU AMD Ryzen 5 5600G
GPU with Radeon Graphics 4G
RAM 32 GB
## Please test the modpack on your own system, as results may vary depending on your hardware configuration. # Quick Start 1. Download the [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) 2. Install the FardinSO Fps Modpack via "Browse" in the app. 3. Play and enjoy optimized performance.
